steps.t: Whatever killed the man on the road in the northern Writhendowns is likely nearby. You should search to the south, towards the Isingmere lake.
A tower stands alone upon an island in the northern Isingmere lake, filling you with dread when you look upon it. You should investigate the tower upo…
A Daegul stands upon the island in the northern Isingmere lake. You should speak with the Daegul.
